name: Toasted Garlic Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh herbs, i.e. parsley or basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Slice the loaf of bread lengthwise and separate into halves.
3. In a mini-chop food processor, combine garlic and herbs and process for 10 seconds until coarsely chopped.
4. Add butter to the food processor and process until smooth and well combined.
5. Spread the butter mixture over the halves of bread.
6. Place the bread on a baking sheet and sprinkle grated cheese evenly over the top.
7. Broil in the oven for 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
8. Cut into 1-inch slices and serve warm.
